arabic_text:
تقسیم مرتب
ھاشم
عبد المطلب
ابو طالب
عبد اللہ
کفالت صغریٰ
کفالت کبریٰ
مجمع کلی
علی
محمد
وَأَبُوهُمَا خَيرٌ مِّنْهُمَا
اَلْحَسَنُ وَالْحُسَيْنُ اِمَامُ حَقٍّ قَامَ أَو قَعَادَۃ
حسن
حسین
قائم
english_text:
Ordered Distribution (Taqsim Murattab)
Hashim
Abd al-Muttalib
Abu Talib
Abdullah
Lesser Guardianship (Kafalat Sughra)
Greater Guardianship (Kafalat Kubra)
Universal Assembly (Majma' Kulli)
Ali
Muhammad
'Their father is better than them'
'Hasan and Husayn are Imams of Truth — whether standing or sitting'
Hasan
Husayn
Qa'im
alt_text: A genealogical-spiritual succession diagram titled 'تقسیم مرتب' (Ordered Distribution). Boxes connected by numbered lines (1-8). From top: 'ھاشم' (Hashim) → 'عبد المطلب' (Abd al-Muttalib) → splits into 'ابو طالب' (Abu Talib, left) and 'عبد اللہ' (Abdullah, right), connected by 'کفالت صغریٰ' (Lesser Guardianship). Down to 'علی' (Ali, yellow highlighted, marked 'مجمع کلی' / Universal Assembly, with fire icon for spirit) and 'محمد' (Muhammad, red highlighted, marked 'مجمع کلی', with fire icon), connected via 'کفالت کبریٰ' (Greater Guardianship). Two Arabic snippets between them: 'وَأَبُوهُمَا خَيرٌ مِّنْهُمَا' (their father is better than them) and 'الحسن والحسین امام حق قام او قعادہ' (Hasan and Husayn are Imams of Truth — standing or sitting). Then → 'حسن' and 'حسین' → terminating at stacked 'قائم' cards. Each box has two colored dots (one red, one blue) representing dual attributes.
notes: Master ordered-distribution diagram for the Banu Hashim line. The Lesser/Greater Guardianship distinction maps the two-tier kinship structure onto the spiritual ranks. The hadith 'الحسن والحسین امام حق قام او قعادہ' is the locus classicus for the dual imamate of Hasan and Husayn (whether quiescent or active). The dual red/blue dots in each box are likely attribute markers (knowledge / action, or revelation / concealment) that the chapter explains.
